channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 110,000 — Negotiable 4-Bedroom Family Home For Sale in Norton (Norton)
item.description: USD 110,000 — Norton. 3 beds, 2 baths. Negotiable 4-Bedroom Family Home For Sale in Norton. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
